description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a black faux leather or vinyl seat and backrest with horizontal ribbed stitching for added texture and support. The chair has a rectangular backrest and seat, both of which are slightly contoured for ergonomic comfort. It is supported by a central metal column that branches out into a five-pointed star base, each point ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The armrests are thin, angular, and made of metal, matching the base, and are attached to the seat and backrest at right angles. The overall appearance is professional and utilitarian, suitable for office or conference room settings in urban environments. The chair's surfaces are mostly smooth and slightly glossy, with a hard tactile feel.
description: A sleek black swivel chair with ribbed faux leather upholstery, metal armrests, and a five-caster star base. Its modern, minimalist design is ideal for office or conference use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed seat and backrest, straight armrests, and the symmetrical five-caster base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thin, angular armrest and the flat, rectangular profile of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid backrest with horizontal ribbing and the full width of the chair's back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the seat's flat profile.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping, connects the seat to the five-pointed star base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, medium-height backrest with horizontal ribbed stitching, slightly contoured, covered in black faux leather.
attribute_armrest_style: Present; thin, angular metal armrests attached at right angles to the seat and backrest, with a minimalist design.
